target: Make the machine an oiled machine: terse directive-only instruction files, zero fiction/external-naming, minimal context per loop iteration. Same behavior, fewer moving parts.

canonical.law: Machine law lives in agents/default.md; project layer in /.proj/.
canonical.real_proj_layout: agent.md, project.md (SINGLE file), glossary.csv, personas/ + personas.md, plans/, skills/. NO .proj/config/, NO .proj/project/ dir. Canonical initializer = /bootstrap.
canonical.sole_driver_rule: Run this /improve loop from ONE session only. improve.json has no lock; one cron = one writer (see glossary: sole driver).
canonical.terseness_pattern: Cut dup-frontmatter prose, Phase/Step narrative, time estimates, false-precision metrics, and FICTION (nonexistent configs/agents/commands/paths/CLI/settings keys). KEEP all real facts + [HARD] rules + delegation + done-when. Verify frontmatter + refs intact after each edit. Root-cause reconciliation over blind trimming.
